task_description: Upgrade DataPrism Streamlit app with new features: enhanced data ingestion (multi-format, paste mode, sample datasets), data profiling (quality score, column profiles, AI commentary, correlation heatmap), expanded data cleaning (AI assistant, text operations, cap outliers, flag missing), advanced analytics (statistical tests, regression, clustering, forecasting, EDA), AI intelligence layer (insight cards, explain number, executive summary), dashboards (KPI cards, full chart library, auto-build, global filters), PDF/DOCX report export with branding, guided mode enhancements (glossary, guardrails, sensitivity), workspace features (projects, audit log, versioning, onboarding), UX polish (empty states, keep-alive), and switchable premium themes.

verification.summary: All 33 Python files compile. All utility modules import successfully. Functional tests pass for: sample datasets (5), paste parsing, quality scoring, linear regression, K-Means clustering, PDF/DOCX generation, and sensitivity detection. GitHub Actions YAML validates. SUPABASE_SETUP.md contains all required tables.
